title: Candles at Nine
writer: Anthony Gilbert, John Harlow, Basil Mason
actors: Eliot Makeham, Beatrix Lehmann, John Salew
plot: A rich but miserly old man taunts his relatives about who will get his money when he dies, and is soon mysteriously murdered. It turns out that he has left his estate to a beautiful young actress whom the other relatives didn't kn...
